posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Our new features webinar is coming up and it will be taking place on monday mansion! Join us to learn all about the latest new features on monday.com .

Whats on the schedule?
30-40 mins - Demonstration of new releases
20-30 mins - Q&A

Plus you will be able to walk around the interactive monday mansion and learn about the different products and more! Check it out!
